zh.lifeSummary: 當John William Reade於大約1461年出生在英國林可爾史爾福朗格爾時，他的父親Thomas Reade30歲，母親Elizabeth Ann Wells25歲。他於1475年與Lady Margaret Beauchamp結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1503年10月24日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾福朗格爾享年43歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾福朗格爾。

nameMeanings.name: Reade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Read
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Reed  .

History: A family called Read were established in America in the early 18th century by John Read, who was born in Dublin, sixth in descent from Sir Thomas Read of Berkshire, England. His son, George Read (1733–98), was one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence, and as a lawyer helped frame the Constitution.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When John William Reade was born about 1461, in Wrangle, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Thomas Reade, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Ann Wells, was 25. He married Lady Margaret Beauchamp in 1475. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 24 October 1503, in Wrangle, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43, and was buried in Wrangle, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John William Reade est né environ 1461, à Wrangle, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Reade, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Ann Wells, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Beauchamp en 1475. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 24 octobre 1503, à Wrangle, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Wrangle, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

Er hat 1475 Lady Margaret Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Oktober 1503 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Wrangle, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wrangle, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Lady Margaret Beauchamp nel 1475. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 24 ottobre 1503, nel Wrangle, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Wrangle, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John William Readeが約1461年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウラングルで生まれた時，父Thomas Readeは30歳，母Elizabeth Ann Wellsは25歳であった。1475年にLady Margaret Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1503年10月24日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウラングルで43歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアウラングルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John William Reade(이)가 대략 1461년 영국 링코실르 랑글에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Reade(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Ann Wells(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1475년 Lady Margaret Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1503년 10월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 랑글에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 랑글에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Beauchamp em 1475. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John William Reade родился около 1461 г. в местности рангл, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Reade было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Ann Wells, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Beauchamp в 1475 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 24 октября 1503 г. в местности рангл, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности рангл, линколншир, Англия.
